author: rstuhlmuller
description: Program to keep DNS A and/or AAAA records updated for multiple DNS providers
tagline: Simple and easy to use DDNS
releaseNotes:
- v2.9.0 adds provider support for domene.shop, loopia.se, vultr.com, myaddr.tools, and namesilo.com.
- Health server configuration can run outside Docker or be disabled in containers.
- Fixes include multi-address public IP handling, IPv6 hostname resolution, Porkbun, Gandi, DonDominio, Netcup, GCP, file permissions, NoIP response parsing, real IP logging, and response trimming.
title: ddns-updater
